description_long: This object is a rectangular, raised donut with a smooth, glossy chocolate glaze covering the entire top surface. Over the chocolate glaze, there are evenly spaced, wavy lines of bright red icing running lengthwise, adding a decorative and appetizing touch. The sides and bottom of the donut reveal a light, golden-brown baked dough, typical of yeast-raised donuts. The surface appears soft and slightly puffy, suggesting a fresh, airy interior. There are no visible toppings such as sprinkles or nuts, and the donut is unwrapped with no packaging present. The donut is shown isolated, with no plate, tray, or other placement context visible.
description: A rectangular donut with glossy chocolate glaze and wavy red icing lines on top, featuring a light, airy dough base. No toppings or packaging are present.
description_view_0: Front view shows the chocolate glaze and red icing lines prominently, with the rounded edge of the donut's dough base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, rectangular shape and the continuous chocolate glaze and red icing pattern across the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the chocolate glaze and red icing lines, with the dough base visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the length and surface details of the chocolate and red icing.
attribute_icing_type: Glossy chocolate glaze with wavy red sugar icing lines on top.
